scheme_name: DSP Multi Asset Allocation Fund - Regular (G)
benchmark: 40% NIFTY500 TRI + 20% NIFTY Composite Debt Index+ 15% Domestic price of Gold + 5% iCOMDEX Composite Index + 20% MSCI World Index.
_notes: Fund is ~2.6 years old (Inception 27 Sep 2023, as_of 04 May 2026), so return_3y is NA. Benchmark text includes a trailing period because the PDF prints it that way (matched verbatim). Mkt cap composition does not sum to 100 because the fund holds significant Gold/Silver ETFs (Alternate) and other non-equity assets. composition_json_keys reflect the 5-bucket breakdown of a multi-asset fund. The 3-row delta from a prior 97 reflects chart-axis tokens (year labels at the bottom of the Detailed Portfolio page) being correctly filtered out by the alphabetic-content guard on security_name.
